note: Live PTZ verification via AxxonMcpPtz on the demo stand. Host/credentials are env-only and never written here; intrinsic hosts/Server/... UIDs retained per policy.

discovery.via: DomainService.ListComponents full config graph (501 components), NOT the filtered inventory (200)
discovery.note: The earlier 'no PTZ on stand' gap was a false negative from reading only the filtered inventory; the device exists.

verified_live.set_preset: ok (returns SessionUnavailable error_code once session TTL short-expires)

emulator_capability_limits.note: The DeviceIpint.53 telemetry driver is an emulator. It supports AcquireSessionId, IsSessionAvailable, GetPositionInformation, AbsoluteMove, GetPresetsInfo, SetPreset2, GetAuxiliaryOperations. It returns 'operation returned error: 1' for continuous Move/Zoom/GoPreset/ReleaseSessionId. These are driver limits, not tool defects; the tool surfaces them as structured results. A hardware PTZ camera supports the continuous modes.
